headline: Trump Financial Disclosure Shows 21,000 Trades in 2025
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump made more than 21,000 securities trades in his first year back in office, often in intense bursts tied to market events he created.Most Read from BloombergExxon to Change Name for First Time in Decades After RedomicileMeta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing PowerGermany Rejects Trump’s Demands for NATO Loyalty to WashingtonRussia Indicates Ukraine Fired Long-Range Ballistic MissileKrafton Agrees to Pay ‘Subnautica 2’ Bonuses as Developer’s CEO

headline: House committee investigates Merck, AbbVie over China trials
summary: Five of the biggest names in American pharma just got a deadline from Washington. The House Select Committee on China sent letters this week to Merck (MRK), AbbVie (ABBV), Eli Lilly (LLY), Pfizer (PFE), and Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY), Reuters reported. Lawmakers want each company to explain ...

headline: $500 a Month in These Stocks Will Generate $6,700 in Passive Annual Income
summary: Passive income is the paycheck that arrives whether you show up or not. Wages depend on a functioning employer, a healthy economy, and the continued willingness of both to keep the seat warm. Dividend income depends on a company writing a check every 90 days, and for a handful of blue chips, that check has ... $500 a Month in These Stocks Will Generate $6,700 in Passive Annual Income

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.
